summary: Frontend-only Playwright E2E verification of The Bharat Palace luxury landing page. All 17 critical flows validated on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). No blocking issues found. Every CTA (tel:, wa.me, maps.app.goo.gl) points to the correct destination; the enquiry form correctly builds a wa.me deep link with URL-encoded name/phone/event/date/guests and 'Hello Bharat Palace' text, opens in a new tab via window.open, and does NOT reload the page.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer social links use href='#' which will scroll to top (harmless but should be '#' avoided or use real IG/FB/YT URLs).

content.js CONTACT.mapsReviews contains a placeholder google maps place_id ('ChIJ_____the_bharat_palace') — it is currently unused (Testimonials 'Read More Reviews' uses CONTACT.maps instead) but should be either populated with the real place_id or removed to avoid confusion.
Hero indicators use w-5 (20px) touch target — acceptable but small on mobile.
Enquiry form does no client-side sanitisation on phone/guest fields beyond HTML5 type; not a bug since flow is WhatsApp deep-link only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows verified via /app/test_reports (Playwright inline). Verified: hero title 'Celebrate Life's Grandest Moments', nav transparent-at-top -> bg-[#0e0e0e]/90 + backdrop-blur-xl after scrolling past 40px, smooth-scroll nav (Contact/Gallery), hero indicators (3), hero Book Now scrolls to #contact, hero Call href tel:+916386243721, FABs (wa.me, tel, maps) with correct hrefs+target=_blank, About highlights=7 items (rendered without <li>, using div grid — 7 items confirmed in source), WhyChooseUs 8 facility- data-testids, EventCategories 8 cards clicking scrolls to #contact, Stats numbers 146/24/400/100 present on page, Gallery: All=9 items, Weddings=2, Stage=2, lightbox opens/next/prev/Escape closes/X closes/ArrowKeys work, Testimonials: 3 review cards with correct names & Read More Reviews -> CONTACT.maps, Enquiry form submit builds wa.me?text=... with URL-encoded 'Hello Bharat Palace' + name + phone + event + date + guests, opens via window.open in new tab, page does not reload, form persists. Contact directions/call/whatsapp hrefs correct, embedded google map iframe present. Footer 3 columns + quick links with data-testid=footer-link-*. Mobile 390px: hamburger toggle opens menu, 7 nav-mobile-* links + nav-mobile-book visible. No JS console errors detected during runs.
